title: IndustriesEinsteinFeatureSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents the settings for enabling the Industries Einstein feature.

documentReaderConfidenceOrgValue.description: Specify the confidence score threshold to indicate the reliability of data in a document. You can enter a number from 0 to 100, with up to two decimal places, where 0 is the least confident and 100 is the most confident.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="IndustriesEinsteinFeatureSettings">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="documentReaderConfidenceOrgValue" type="xsd:double"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```
